---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case this would unlock.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or links relevant to the request.
